span.p: Initialise: Case State + Goal + Model Version

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PLAN
Planner: What evidence do I need next?

span.p:
VERIFY
Retrieval Verifier DETERMINISTIC
Does chunk exist? Is claim recoverable?

Log to Unverified Register
